allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content "참고자료\\청출어람_대시보드_디자인.html" -Encoding UTF8; $i=0; foreach \($line in $content\) { $i++; if \($line.Length -gt 300\) { Write-Output \("$i : " + $line.Substring\(0,150\) + " ...[LONG: " + $line.Length + "]"\) } else { Write-Output \("$i : " + $line\) } })
PowerShell(python -m pip install streamlit pillow pandas --quiet)
PowerShell(python -c "import streamlit, PIL, pandas; print\('streamlit', streamlit.__version__, '| pillow', PIL.__version__, '| pandas', pandas.__version__\)")

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app.py","--server.headless","true","--server.port","8503" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8503" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output \("HTTP " + $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("FAILED: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -Confirm:$false)

PowerShell(python -c "import pandas as pd; print\(pd.read_csv\('data/regions.csv', encoding='utf-8-sig'\).head\(2\).to_string\(\)\); print\(\); print\(pd.read_csv\('data/analysis_log.csv', encoding='utf-8-sig'\).head\(3\).to_string\(\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python -c "import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv\('data/analysis_log.csv', encoding='utf-8-sig'\); print\(df.columns.tolist\(\)\); print\(df.head\(3\).to_string\(\)\); print\(df['상태'].value_counts\(\).to_dict\(\)\)")

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m","streamlit","run","app.py","--server.headless","true","--server.port","8504" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; $env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python verify_fit.py; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -Confirm:$false)
